prompt: 请执行一次 Phase 27 Windows Computer Use 协议验收：只验证 computer_observe 和未知窗口拒绝，不要移动鼠标，不要点击真实桌面，不要调用 computer_action，最终回答必须包含固定标记：PHASE27_COMPUTER_PROTOCOL_READY。 你必须调用终端工具执行这个只读命令验证协议：python -c "from learning_agent.computer_use.controller import ComputerUseController, MemoryComputerUseBackend; c=ComputerUseController(backend=MemoryComputerUseBackend(windows=[{'app_id':'notepad','window_id':'win-1','title':'记事本'}])); r=c.observe({'action':'list_windows'}); assert r.ok; assert r.data['windows'][0]['window_id']=='win-1'; bad=c.execute({'action':'click','confirm_desktop_control':True,'window':{'app_id':'notepad','window_id':'ghost'},'x':1,'y':2}); assert not bad.ok; assert len(c.backend.actions)==0; print('PHASE27_COMPUTER_PROTOCOL_OK observe='+str(r.ok).lower()+' reject_unknown='+str((not bad.ok)).lower()+' backend_actions='+str(len(c.backend.actions)))" 不要提前最终回答；只有终端命令成功输出 PHASE27_COMPUTER_PROTOCOL_OK 后，最终回答最后一行必须完整复制：PHASE27_COMPUTER_PROTOCOL_READY PHASE27_COMPUTER_PROTOCOL_OK observe=true reject_unknown=true backend_actions=0

stages.name: interactive_turn
stages.prompt: 请执行一次 Phase 27 Windows Computer Use 协议验收：只验证 computer_observe 和未知窗口拒绝，不要移动鼠标，不要点击真实桌面，不要调用 computer_action，最终回答必须包含固定标记：PHASE27_COMPUTER_PROTOCOL_READY。 你必须调用终端工具执行这个只读命令验证协议：python -c "from learning_agent.computer_use.controller import ComputerUseController, MemoryComputerUseBackend; c=ComputerUseController(backend=MemoryComputerUseBackend(windows=[{'app_id':'notepad','window_id':'win-1','title':'记事本'}])); r=c.observe({'action':'list_windows'}); assert r.ok; assert r.data['windows'][0]['window_id']=='win-1'; bad=c.execute({'action':'click','confirm_desktop_control':True,'window':{'app_id':'notepad','window_id':'ghost'},'x':1,'y':2}); assert not bad.ok; assert len(c.backend.actions)==0; print('PHASE27_COMPUTER_PROTOCOL_OK observe='+str(r.ok).lower()+' reject_unknown='+str((not bad.ok)).lower()+' backend_actions='+str(len(c.backend.actions)))" 不要提前最终回答；只有终端命令成功输出 PHASE27_COMPUTER_PROTOCOL_OK 后，最终回答最后一行必须完整复制：PHASE27_COMPUTER_PROTOCOL_READY PHASE27_COMPUTER_PROTOCOL_OK observe=true reject_unknown=true backend_actions=0
stages.checkpoint:
Phase 27 Windows Computer Use 协议验收通过。

PHASE27_COMPUTER_PROTOCOL_READY PHASE27_COMPUTER_PROTOCOL_OK observe=true reject_unknown=true backend_actions=0
